<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$RDPS$ = Health / Spawnrate
$TDPS$ = Gun DPS + Ram DPS
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 2000; 1250; 3400; 16500; 50000
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 2; ; 0
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Lvl 1. Broke; Lvl. 2 Normie; Lvl 3. Gamer; Lvl. 4 GOD
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 3032133716; 3444643559; 3838914605; 3444644903
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Golden Perks
$CREF$ = <ref>Does not account for unit DPS.</ref>
$GREF$ = <ref>Goons are not affected by any buffs or debuffs.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="7" | Crook Boss Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency$CREF$
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.8 || 16.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 13 || 0.55 || 16.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 24 || 0.55 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 24 || 0.18 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 40 || 0.12 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="13" | Goon Stats$GREF$
|-
! Level !! Goon !! Health !! Damage !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Lifespan !! Limit !! Range !! Detections !! Gun DPS !! Ram DPS !! Total DPS
|-
| 0-4 || [[Golden Pistol Goon]] || 40 || 4 || 45 || 0.6 || 200 || 10 || 17 || Flying || $DPS$ || $RDPS$ || $TDPS$
|-
| 3 || [[Golden Tommy Goon 1]] || 175 || 5 || 31 || 0.18 || 150 || 3 || 22.5 || Hidden, Flying || $DPS$ || $RDPS$ || $TDPS$
|-
| 4 || [[Golden Tommy Goon 2]] || 300 || 6 || 31 || 0.12 || 150 || 3 || 24 || Hidden, Flying || $DPS$ || $RDPS$ || $TDPS$
|}
</div>
